source: ADG12 Batch A result: 7/9 samples reverse_fixture_mapping_error

root_cause_analysis.primary_cause: Ligue 1 double round-robin team-pair key collision without home/away orientation binding
mechanism: FotMob L1 API league overview returns match records for both home and away legs of double round-robin fixtures
team-pair key (e.g. 'angers|paris fc') matches BOTH legs but does not encode which leg is home vs away
source inventory candidate generation picks the WRONG leg's page URL when the team-pair key is ambiguous
URL hash fragment #detail_id points to the reverse fixture, not the expected schedule fixture
enriched target regeneration propagates detail_external_id_candidate without strict home/away validation
ADG9 strict guard CORRECTLY detects the inversion but only at validation time, not at candidate generation time
why_not_detected_earlier: Before ADG9 strict guard, there was no home/away validation at all
Before ADG12 Batch A actual evidence acquisition, the 37 missing-observed targets had no observed identity to compare
Positive control #4813735 (Premier League single round-robin check) did not trigger the Ligue 1 double round-robin issue

runtime_paths_to_correct.issue: detail_external_id_candidate is accepted from URL hash without home/away validation
runtime_paths_to_correct.planned_correction: Add home/away orientation check using source_inventory evidence fields. If URL slug or route code indicates inverted home/away, mark candidate status=rejected_not_active.

runtime_paths_to_correct.issue: Enrichment propagates detail_external_id_candidate without fixture identity validation
runtime_paths_to_correct.planned_correction: Add inline call to validateStrictFixtureIdentity() during enrichment. Reject candidates with reverse_fixture_mapping_error.

runtime_paths_to_correct.issue: Regenerated targets carry detail_external_id_candidate as active even when home/away orientation is unknown
runtime_paths_to_correct.planned_correction: Add strict_guard_classification to each regenerated target. Set regeneration_blockers for reverse_fixture targets.

runtime_paths_to_correct.issue: Guard works correctly but is only called at acquisition/validation time
runtime_paths_to_correct.planned_correction: No change to guard logic itself. Ensure it is called during candidate generation/enrichment/regeneration, not just at evidence acquisition.

rules.description: When source inventory generates a detail_external_id_candidate from URL hash, also extract expected home/away from the source page URL structure or L1 API record. If URL path/slug suggests reversed home/away vs schedule, mark candidate as 'blocked_home_away_inversion'.

During candidate enrichment, if expected home/away teams and observed teams are both available, run validateStrictFixtureIdentity(). If guard blocks, set enrichment_status=blocked_reverse_fixture and do not propagate as active candidate.

During enriched target regeneration, add strict_guard_classification field. For any target with reverse_fixture_mapping_error, set regeneration_status=blocked, set regeneration_blockers=['home_away_inversion','reverse_fixture_mapping_error','correction_needed'].

Add new candidate status values: 'rejected_home_away_inversion', 'rejected_reverse_fixture_mapping', 'requires_new_source_inventory_record'. Rejected candidates must NOT be treated as detail_identity_candidate_validated=true.
#4813735 must continue to pass all guards. The correction must not introduce false positives for correct mappings.
Suspended targets (4830461, 4830463, 4830466, etc.) must remain blocked. The correction must not re-accept or unsuspend any suspended target.
URL hash fragment remains as evidence source but does not constitute candidate acceptance. detail_identity_candidate_validated remains false unless strict guard passes.
raw_write_execution_ready=false always. No correction changes the raw_write boundary.

primary_changes: FotMobSourceInventoryAdapter.js: add home/away orientation validation in toManifestCandidateSeed()
pageprops_v2_enriched_target_regeneration_execute.js: add guard classification to regenerated targets

recommendation_on_remaining_37_targets.rationale: 7/7 Ligue 1 samples with observed identity show reverse_fixture_mapping_error. Almost certainly the remaining 37-5=32 targets have the same issue. Further evidence acquisition would only confirm the pattern without changing the outcome.
recommendation_on_remaining_37_targets.recommended_approach: Implement correction guard first (ADG14), then rerun no-write regression (ADG15). Only acquire more evidence after the guard is in place.

recommended_next_step: Phase 5.21-ADG14: runtime source inventory/candidate generation home/away inversion correction implementation. Do not raw write. Do not Batch B/C/D.
